message:
fix: defer useSearchIndex API hooks until user types a search query (#3871) (#3884)

Previously, useSearchIndex was called unconditionally inside
SearchDropdown, causing 7 expensive API hooks (useClusters,
useDeployments, usePods, useServices, useNodes, useHelmReleases,
useMissions) to fire on every page load even when search was never used.

This extracts the search results rendering into a SearchResultsPanel
child component that only mounts when the search bar is open AND the
query is non-empty. When unmounted, none of the API hooks run, avoiding
unnecessary network requests and polling on every navigation.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
